creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 247273
patch

Hi Po-Chuan,


I've encountered a crash while running PyTorch, and I traced it down to this problem in protobuf: https://github.com/protocolbuffers/protobuf/issues/15194

The attached patch is a workaround based on the 7+ year old patch that was suggested by someone for this problem before, but that was never adopted by the protobuf.

Could you please either approve or commit it?


Thank you,
Yuri
